subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast sincerely turned thy face unto God, who hast awakened and awakened every slumberer, who hast become mindful and roused every heedless one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اخلص وجهه لله و استیقظ و ایقظ کل نائم و انتبه و نبه کل غافل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @symbolism, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
